notes: Pickleheads' city index page (https://www.pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/fremont) states '11 Most Popular Pickleball Courts' totaling 55 courts (3 indoor locations/14 courts, 7 outdoor locations/41 courts), but despite roughly 20 varied WebSearch queries (site:-scoped, per-venue-name, per-nearby-landmark, and aggregator cross-checks), only 7 distinct pickleheads.com venue detail pages surfaced: fremont-tennis-center, fremont-central-park-knoll, raindance-pickleball, bay-club-fremont, mission-hills-racquet-and-swim-club, bintang-badminton, and vallejo-mill-historical-park. A third-party aggregator (bounce.game) independently lists exactly '7 locations' for Fremont, which is at least weak corroboration that 7 is what's actually indexable, but doesn't resolve the gap against Pickleheads' own '11' claim. Irvington Community Center (Wally Pond, 41885 Blacow Rd) is a real Fremont pickleball venue per fremont.gov and multiple third-party court-finder sites, and several WebSearch AI summaries asserted it's 'listed on Pickleheads' when asked directly — but no query ever returned an actual pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/fremont/<slug> URL for it, so it is NOT included in the venues array below (can't cite a source I couldn't verify). A human with direct (non-WebFetch-blocked) browser access to pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/fremont should check for Irvington and the 3 other unaccounted-for locations directly against the live page.

venues.name: Fremont Tennis Center
venues.netType: Portable nets on converted tennis courts (3 regulation pickleball courts on a 60' junior tennis court, 4 more on a converted 78' tennis court)
venues.hours: Mon–Fri 7:30am–4:30pm and 4:30pm–10pm; Sat–Sun 7:30am–10pm (facility hours). Free/drop-in play: Mon–Fri 7:30am–3pm, Tue & Thu 6–10pm, Sat 2–6pm, Sun 1–3pm. Reservations up to 7 days ahead for residents, 5 for non-residents.
venues.weather: Inland Tri-Valley-adjacent — hot, sunny, especially summer afternoons
venues.notes: googleMapsUrl carried forward unchanged from existing courts-data.json entry (same venue, no new cid found). Pickleheads corroborates court count (7), surface (concrete), and reservation fees exactly matching baseline; adds hours, amenities, and net-type detail baseline didn't have.

venues.name: Fremont Central Park Knoll
venues.address: Central Park, off Civic Center Dr, Fremont, CA 94539 (between Fremont PD and the Fremont Main Library)
venues.netType: Dedicated pickleball courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.hours: Dawn to dusk / until 8:00pm, no lights, first come first served
venues.weather: Inland Tri-Valley-adjacent — hot, sunny, especially summer afternoons
venues.notes: Matched to existing id 'central-park-knoll-pickleball-courts' by address/venue identity; Pickleheads uses the name 'Fremont Central Park Knoll' instead. Existing courts-data.json googleMapsUrl uses a place_id: format (ChIJW4eYYQDBj4AR37pxMTHogPE), which is not the cid= format this research file requires — left null here rather than carry forward a non-compliant format; a human should re-derive the numeric cid. Pickleheads adds a 4.7 (6 reviews) rating and amenities (water, wheelchair accessibility) baseline didn't have. One Yelp listing gave the street address as '40000 Paseo Padre Pkwy' (same street number as Fremont Tennis Center) — plausible since Central Park is an ~450-acre park with multiple entrances/addresses; not treated as a conflict.

venues.name: Raindance Pickleball
venues.price: Small fee to share cost of balls, net, and court maintenance (exact amount not stated)
venues.weather: Inland Tri-Valley-adjacent — hot, sunny, especially summer afternoons
venues.notes: Existing courts-data.json/venues.json entry had address 'Fremont, CA' with approx:true and city-center lat/lon (37.5482697, -121.988571 — confirmed via search to be Fremont's generic city-level coordinates, not the venue). Pickleheads gives a full street address (45933 Raindance Rd), a real upgrade over the approx flag, but I could not independently confirm precise lat/lon for that address, so left null rather than guess — a human with map access should geocode it and clear the approx:true flag in venues.json. Two Pickleheads URL slugs surfaced for this venue with identical page titles ('raindance-pickleball' and 'raindance-pickleball-in-fremont'); used the shorter one as canonical, listed both as sources.

venues.name: Bay Club Fremont
venues.netType: Dedicated pickleball courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.hours: Mon–Fri 6am–10pm, Sat–Sun 7am–7pm (general club hours; pickleball-specific windows not separately stated by Pickleheads)
venues.weather: Inland Tri-Valley-adjacent — hot, sunny, especially summer afternoons
venues.notes: Same physical location as existing id 'clubsport-fremont' (identical street address 46650 Landing Pkwy AND identical Google Place ID ChIJtx8ao07Gj4ARZfAg8FV7Jl0 — the existing courts-data.json entry's own googleMapsUrl uses this exact place_id, and an independent Waze search for 'Bay Club Fremont' resolved to the same place_id). This strongly indicates ClubSport Fremont was rebranded to Bay Club Fremont (multiple reviews mention the ClubSport→Bay Club transition), not a coincidentally co-located separate venue. Left as existing-conflict, not existing-update, because of the unresolved court-count discrepancy (4 vs 8) — a human should verify current court count on-site before merging. googleMapsUrl's cid (6712187903673430117) was derived by converting the hex feature id (0x5d267b55f020f065) from the Google Maps place URL found via search into decimal — standard cid derivation, not fabricated, but flagging the method for verifiability.

venues.weather: Inland Tri-Valley-adjacent — hot, sunny, especially summer afternoons
venues.notes: IMPORTANT OPERATIONAL CAVEAT: City of Fremont sources describe this park as closed for a reconstruction project (dog park + 4 new lit pickleball courts) that began 2025-08-25 and was expected to run 'until early 2026.' As of this research date (2026-07-10) I could not confirm whether the park has actually reopened — Pickleheads lists it as an active venue, but a human should verify it's open and the courts are complete before treating this as a live, playable location. No matching entry in existing courts-data.json/venues.json Fremont baseline. Could not find a Google Maps place link with a hex feature id, so googleMapsUrl left null.
